home.freeDesc: No fees, no commissions. Re-Bali is free for everyone.

about.title: About Re-Bali
about.description: Re-Bali is Bali's trusted marketplace for buying and selling second-hand goods. Whether you're an expat relocating, a local entrepreneur, or a business upgrading equipment — Re-Bali connects you with the right people.
about.missionText: To create a sustainable, trusted, and inclusive marketplace for the Bali community, reducing waste and making quality goods accessible to everyone.
about.trustText: Every transaction is between real people. We encourage meeting in safe public places.
about.sustainabilityText: Giving items a second life reduces waste and supports a circular economy in Bali.
about.communityText: Built by and for the diverse Bali community — locals, expats, and businesses alike.

safety.title: Safety Tips
safety.tip1Desc: Always meet buyers/sellers in well-lit, public areas. Coffee shops and co-working spaces are great options.
safety.tip2Desc: Always check the item in person before completing the transaction.
safety.tip3Desc: Prefer bank transfers or trusted e-wallets. Avoid sending money upfront to strangers.
safety.tip4Desc: If a deal seems too good to be true, it probably is. Report suspicious listings.
safety.tip5Desc: Check the seller's profile, join date, and other listings before transacting.

rules.title: Marketplace Rules
rules.rule1: Be honest in your listings. Describe items accurately.
rules.rule2: No illegal, counterfeit, or prohibited items.
rules.rule4: Respect other users. No harassment or discrimination.
rules.rule6: Listings must include at least one photo.
rules.rule7: Prices must be fair and accurate. Bait pricing is not allowed.
rules.rule8: Re-Bali reserves the right to remove listings or ban users who violate these rules.

trustPage.title: Trust & Badges
trustPage.subtitle: Learn how we calculate trust scores and award badges to build a safer community.
trustPage.scoreExplanation: Every user receives a trust score from 0 to 100, calculated automatically based on their activity and verifications. A higher score means the user is more trustworthy.
trustPage.badgesExplanation: Badges are awarded automatically based on your activity. They appear on your profile and seller page to help buyers trust you.

legal.termsAcceptanceText: By accessing and using Re-Bali, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform. These terms apply to all users, whether buyers or sellers.
legal.termsDescriptionText: Re-Bali is a free online classified ads marketplace connecting buyers and sellers in Bali. We provide a platform for listing and discovering items, services, and opportunities. Re-Bali does not participate in transactions between users and is not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of items listed.
legal.termsAccountText: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account. Phone verification via WhatsApp is required to post listings. Re-Bali reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
legal.termsListingsText: Listings must be accurate, honest, and comply with Indonesian law. You may not post prohibited items including but not limited to: drugs, weapons, counterfeit goods, stolen property, or any illegal items. Photos must represent the actual item being sold. Maximum 5 active listings per user (3 for accounts less than 7 days old).
legal.termsProhibitedText: Users must not: post misleading or fraudulent content, harass other users, attempt to circumvent platform security, use the platform for money laundering, post external links or contact information in listing descriptions, create multiple accounts, or engage in any activity that violates local or international laws.
legal.termsLiabilityText: Re-Bali is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from the use of our platform. We do not guarantee the accuracy of listings or the reliability of users. All transactions are conducted at your own risk. We strongly recommend meeting in public places and inspecting items before purchase.
legal.termsModificationText: Re-Bali reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.termsContactText: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us through our platform or visit the About page for more information.
legal.privacyCollectionText: We collect information you provide directly: email address, display name, phone number (for WhatsApp verification), profile photo, and listing content (photos, descriptions, prices). We also automatically collect device information, browser type, IP address, and usage data to improve security and user experience.
legal.privacyUseText: Your information is used to: provide and maintain the platform, verify your identity, display your listings, enable communication between buyers and sellers, detect and prevent fraud, calculate trust scores, send important notifications, and improve our services. We never sell your personal data to third parties.
legal.privacyStorageText: Your data is stored securely on Supabase infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. Listing data is retained as long as your account is active. ID verification documents are automatically purged after review. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
legal.privacySharingText: We share limited information publicly: your display name, profile photo, and listing details are visible to all users. Your phone number is shared only when you choose to be contacted via WhatsApp. We may share information with law enforcement when required by Indonesian law or to protect the safety of our users.
legal.privacyCookiesText: We use essential cookies to maintain your login session and preferences (language, theme). We do not use third-party advertising cookies. Analytics data is collected anonymously to understand platform usage and improve the service.
legal.privacyRightsText: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate information, delete your account and data, export your data, withdraw consent for data processing, and lodge a complaint. To exercise these rights, visit your Profile page or contact us.
legal.privacySecurityText: We implement multiple security measures including: encrypted data storage, device fingerprinting for fraud detection, content filtering, automated trust scoring, VPN detection, and watermarking of listing photos. Despite these measures, no system is 100% secure.
legal.privacyContactText: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, please contact us through our platform or visit the About page.
